languages.text: "Тренировочный бой окончен! Время присяги. Каков будет приказ, командующий?" {n}В единственном целом глазу Ведки блестят слезы.{/n}
"The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Тренировочный бой окончен! Время присяги. Каков будет приказ, командующий?" {n}В единственном целом глазу Ведки блестят слезы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The Trial Match is over! ! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}
"The Trial Match is over! ! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

"The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}
"The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

languages.text: “试炼比武已经结束！该宣誓了。请下令吧，指挥官。”{n}薇德卡仅剩的那只眼睛里闪着泪光。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “试炼比武已经结束！该宣誓了。请下令吧，指挥官。”{n}薇德卡仅剩的那只眼睛里闪着泪光。{/n}

languages.text: "Sınav Karşılaşması sona erdi! Yemin etme vakti. Emredin komutanım." {n}Vedka'nın kalan tek gözünde yaşlar parlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sınav Karşılaşması sona erdi! Yemin etme vakti. Emredin komutanım." {n}Vedka'nın kalan tek gözünde yaşlar parlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « L'Épreuve par les armes est terminée ! L'heure de l'allégeance a sonné. Quels sont vos ordres, {mf|commandant|commandante} ? » {n}L'œil fonctionnel de Vedka se remplit de larmes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « L'Épreuve par les armes est terminée ! L'heure de l'allégeance a sonné. Quels sont vos ordres, {mf|commandant|commandante} ? » {n}L'œil fonctionnel de Vedka se remplit de larmes.{/n}

languages.text: «¡La prueba de combate ha concluido! Es el momento del juramento. ¿Sus órdenes, comandante?». {n}Las lágrimas relucen en el ojo sano de Vedka.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡La prueba de combate ha concluido! Es el momento del juramento. ¿Sus órdenes, comandante?». {n}Las lágrimas relucen en el ojo sano de Vedka.{/n}

languages.text: "Der Prüfungskampf ist vorbei! Es wird Zeit für den Eid. Eure Befehle, Commander?" {n}In Vedkas verbliebenem Auge glänzen Tränen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Prüfungskampf ist vorbei! Es wird Zeit für den Eid. Eure Befehle, Commander?" {n}In Vedkas verbliebenem Auge glänzen Tränen.{/n}

languages.text: 「試練の試合は終了！誓いの時間です。あなたの命令、司令官？」{n}ヴェドカの残された目は涙で光る.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Trial Match is over! It is time for the oath. Your orders, Commander?" {n}Tears glisten in Vedka's remaining eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「試練の試合は終了！誓いの時間です。あなたの命令、司令官？」{n}ヴェドカの残された目は涙で光る.{/n}
